title: Handoff
description: Schema for handoff.json and immutable archived handoffs such as handoff.step-0003.constraint-reviewer.json

handoffId.description: Unique identifier for this handoff (GUID). Generate a new value for every created handoff; never reuse it when updating handoff.json for a later transition.

from.description: Agent that created this handoff (e.g. manager)

step.description: Monotonically increasing handoff sequence number within the run. Increment for every new handoff, including self-handoffs and retries.

input.description: Input to pass to the receiving agent

artifacts.description: Context pack path. Subagents read this only; rules are filtered by activeGroupIds. Do not fall back to the full rule tree.

contextPackPath.description: Path to context.pack.md; condensed context for subagents

allowedFiles.description: Guard rail: only these files may be touched by the receiving agent

branch.description: Branch name for this run (e.g. swarm/add-user-auth)

worktreePath.description: Absolute path to the worktree directory when branching enabled; subagents must operate from this path

deferCommitToUser.description: When true, implementor does NOT commit; leaves changes for user to review and commit

activeGroupIds.description: Rule group IDs activated for this task (from Phase 1 trigger detection)

activeRuleIds.description: Specific rule construct IDs from the registry, resolved from activeGroupIds

activeCommandIds.description: Command construct IDs when the task routes through a command; empty otherwise

activeSkillIds.description: External AGENTS skill IDs when selected for this task; empty otherwise

currentConstraintGroupId.description: Only present during Phase 3 constraint review; the group currently being reviewed

remainingConstraintGroupIds.description: Only present during Phase 3; groups still awaiting constraint review

subPlanIndex.description: Current sub-plan index (1-based) when plan was decomposed

subPlanTotal.description: Total number of sub-plans when plan was decomposed

priorSubPlanSummaries.description: Summary of prior sub-plans for context when running sub-plan N

decomposedFromPlanId.description: ID of the original master plan when decomposed

templateFromSubPlan.description: Sub-plan index that produced this sub-plan's template (if any)

scopedPlanPath.description: Path to the dedicated scoped plan for this sub-plan
